results.reason: 斤量 is determined by race conditions (grade/age/sex) and published at entry time (枠順確定, 2 days before race).
Static attribute derived from birth year. Always known.
Fixed in race program, published weeks before race day.
Racecourse venue (札幌/函館/etc.) is fixed in race program.
Surface type (芝=0/ダート=1/障害=2) is fixed in race program.
Static horse attribute (牡=0/牝=1/セン=2). Always known.

Number of runners is finalized at entry declaration (枠順確定, 2 days before). May decrease by 1-2 on race morning due to scratches, but entry-time count is available the night before. In practice, app.py uses shutuba-hyo count which is pre-race.
馬番 (post position) assigned at entry declaration, 2 days before race.
枠番 derived from horse_num and num_horses via formula: clip(((horse_num-1)*8//num_horses)+1, 1, 8). Both inputs known at entry time.
Jockey career win rate. Expanding window: cumsum(is_win) - current_race_is_win over cumcount (0-indexed). Only past race results used. Bayesian smoothed alpha=30.
Jockey win rate at specific course. Same expanding window construction as jockey_wr_calc. Only past races. Bayesian smoothed alpha=10.
Trainer top-3 rate. Expanding window: cumsum(is_top3) - current over cumcount. Only past races. Bayesian smoothed alpha=20.
Previous race finishing position. groupby('horse_id').shift(1) on 'finish'. Historical data from completed past race.
Previous race last 3F time (上がり3F). shift(1) on agari_3f. Historical data.
Previous race 4th corner position. shift(1) on pass4. Historical data.
Previous race prize money. shift(1) on prize. Historical data.
Finish position 2 races ago. shift(2) on finish. Historical data.
Finish position 3 races ago. shift(3) on finish. Historical data.
Mean of prev_finish, prev2_finish, prev3_finish. All three are safe historical lag features.
Min of prev_finish, prev2_finish, prev3_finish. All three are safe historical lag features.
prev3_finish - prev_finish (positive = improving). Derived from safe lag features.
Count of top-3 finishes among prev_finish/prev2_finish/prev3_finish. Derived from safe lag features.
Mean of prev_last3f and prev2_last3f. Both are safe historical lag features.
Last 3F time from 2 races ago. shift(2) on agari_3f. Historical data.
Current distance minus previous race distance. Current distance from race program; previous distance is historical. shift(1) on distance.
abs(dist_change). Derived from safe feature.
Days since last race (current date_num - shift(1) of date_num). Both dates known before race day. Clipped to 1-365.
Categorical binning of rest_days: [0-6, 7-14, 15-35, 36-63, 64-180, 181+]. Derived from safe feature.
Sire (father) encoded as top-100 frequency rank. Static pedigree data, always known.
Broodmare sire encoded as top-100 frequency rank. Static pedigree data, always known.
Distance category bins [0-1200, 1201-1400, 1401-1800, 1801-2200, 2201+]. Derived from race program distance.
age * 10 + sex_enc. Both components are static/always known.
Season from month: spring(3-5)=0, summer(6-8)=1, autumn(9-11)=2, winter(12-2)=3. Race date is in program.
age * 10 + season. Both components known pre-race.
horse_num / num_horses. Both determined at entry declaration.
Bracket position category: inner(1-3)=0, middle(4-6)=1, outer(7-8)=2. Derived from bracket.
Horse's weight_carry minus race-average weight_carry. All carry weights published at entry time. Uses groupby('race_id_str').transform('mean').
Age clipped to [2, 7]. Derived from known age.
surface_enc * 10 + dist_cat. Both from race program.
course_enc * 10 + surface_enc. Both from race program.
Training center (美浦=0/栗東=1/地方=2/外国=3). Static registration data, always known.
Hardcoded to 0 for central racing. Constant feature, no information content.

log1p of PREVIOUS race's confirmed tansho odds (shift(1) on tansho_odds). This is historical data from a completed past race - NOT the current race's odds. Distinct from the excluded 'odds_log' which is current-race confirmed odds.
Training time (調教タイム 4F) from TARGET JV data (training_4f column). This is the officially published training time record, available before race day. NaN filled with global mean.
Binary flag: training_4f > 0. Whether training time data was recorded. Derived from pre-race training data.
training_time_filled / (distance/200). Both components available pre-race.
Jockey surface-specific win rate. Expanding window: cumsum(is_win) - current over cumcount by (jockey_id, surface_enc). Only past races. Bayesian smoothed alpha=10.
Horse career race count. cumcount per horse_id (0-indexed = races before current). Excludes current race by construction.
Horse career win rate. (cumsum(is_win) - current_is_win) / (cumcount + alpha). Excludes current race. Bayesian smoothed alpha=5.
Horse career top-3 rate. Same construction as horse_career_wr but for is_top3. Excludes current race. Bayesian smoothed alpha=5.
Sire progeny win rate on surface type. Expanding window by (father, surface_enc). cumsum - current. Bayesian smoothed alpha=50.
Sire progeny win rate at distance category. Expanding window by (father, dist_cat). cumsum - current. Bayesian smoothed alpha=50.
BMS progeny win rate on surface type. Expanding window by (bms, surface_enc). cumsum - current. Bayesian smoothed alpha=50.

Best wood training 4F time in 14 days before race from training_times.csv. Condition: d >= race_date - 14 AND d < race_date (strict before). Training data published daily. NaN filled with global mean.
Binary flag: wood_best_4f is not NaN. Whether horse has wood training data in 14 days before race.
Previous race's first 3F lap time. shift(1) on race_first3f from lap_times.csv. Historical race-level pace data from completed past race.
Previous race's last 3F lap time. shift(1) on race_last3f. Historical data from completed past race.
Previous race's pace differential (last3f - first3f). shift(1) on race_pace_diff. Historical data.
Horse's previous agari (prev_last3f) minus previous race pace (prev_race_last3f). Both are shift(1) lag values from completed past races.
Count of wood training sessions in 14 days before race. Condition: d >= race_date - 14 AND d < race_date. Published training data.
Best sakaro (坂路) training 4F time in 14 days before race. Condition: d >= race_date - 14 AND d < race_date. Published daily. NaN filled with global mean.
Best sakaro training 3F time in 14 days before race. Same time window as sakaro_best_4f_filled. NaN filled with global mean.
Binary flag: sakaro_best_4f is not NaN. Whether horse has sakaro training in 14 days before race.
wood_count_2w + sakaro_count_2w. Sum of training sessions in 14 days before race. Both components are pre-race data.
Horse's top-3 rate at distance category. Expanding window by (horse_id, dist_cat). cumsum(is_top3) - current over cumcount. Bayesian smoothed alpha=5.
Horse's top-3 rate on surface type. Expanding window by (horse_id, surface_enc). cumsum(is_top3) - current over cumcount. Bayesian smoothed alpha=5.
Win rate for bracket at course x distance category. Expanding window by frame_key (course_enc + dist_cat + bracket). cumsum(is_win) - current over cumcount. Bayesian smoothed alpha=100.

expanding_window_features_verified.method: All use cumsum() - current_race_value or 0-indexed cumcount(). Data sorted by date_num before computation. Current race outcome excluded from all calculations.

lag_features_verified.method: All use groupby('horse_id').shift(1/2/3) after sorting by (horse_id, date_num, race_num). Only past completed race data referenced.

training_features_verified.method: training_time_filled from TARGET JV published training data. Wood/sakaro features use strict 14-day lookback (d >= race_date - 14 AND d < race_date). All training times are published pre-race.

excluded_leak_features_confirmed.odds_log: EXCLUDED - Current race confirmed tansho odds (確定オッズ). Critical leak: determined by betting market during/after wagering.
excluded_leak_features_confirmed.horse_weight: EXCLUDED - Race-day horse weight (馬体重). Announced 70 minutes before race at paddock.
excluded_leak_features_confirmed.condition_enc: EXCLUDED - Track condition (馬場状態: 良/稍/重/不). Determined on race morning and can change during the day.
excluded_leak_features_confirmed.weight_change: EXCLUDED - Derived from horse_weight (current - previous). Race-day data.
excluded_leak_features_confirmed.weight_cat_dist: EXCLUDED - weight_cat * 10 + dist_cat. Contains race-day data.
excluded_leak_features_confirmed.cond_surface: EXCLUDED - condition_enc * 10 + surface_enc. Contains race-day data.

notes: All 67 features in Pattern A pass the leak audit. Every feature is available by the night before race day (前日夜まで).
The 8 known leak features were correctly excluded from this model and verified in the model's 'leak_removed' metadata.
prev_odds_log (previous race odds) is safe because it references a completed past race, unlike odds_log which would be the current race's confirmed odds.
num_horses may decrease on race morning due to scratches, but the entry-declaration count is stable and sufficient for prediction.
All Bayesian smoothing uses appropriate priors (global rates) to handle cold-start horses/jockeys without leaking information.
Source code verified: train/train_v92_central.py (base functions) and train/train_v93_leakfree.py (Pattern A training). Feature engineering is consistent with leak-free principles.
